# EyeX Technologies

> Foundational intelligence infrastructure for the next generation of global enterprise — secured by design, engineered for scale.

EyeX Technologies builds the QORX platform: a unified orchestration layer for enterprise-grade AI compute, storage, and networking with zero-trust security and sub-4ms latency.

## Pages

- [Platform](/): Overview of the QORX intelligence platform and capabilities.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Operations dashboard preview with telemetry and workloads.
- [AI Chat](/ai-chat): Enterprise AI assistant workspace.
- [Documents](/documents): Document intelligence and secure knowledge workflows.
- [API](/api): API platform, keys management, and real-time traffic logs.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Usage analytics — token consumption and system latency.
- [About](/about): EyeX origin story, team, and principles.
